title: dolicholus cuernavacanus
intro:
Dolicholus cuernavacanus is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to Mexico, and is also known as the Cuernevaca bean or dolicholus bean.

Dolicholus cuernavacanus is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine to treat various ailments. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Dolicholus cuernavacanus can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
